title: Osaurus brings both local and cloud AI models to your Mac

title: Indian Uber rival Rapido raises $240M at $3B valuation
snippet: Rapido has driven its growth by enabling ride-hailing for lower-cost and more flexible modes of transport such as motorbikes and autorickshaws.
